sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29658" key="dusw/motos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσώμοτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29658.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hardly</tr_>, i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reluctantly, swearing</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
